content: We can reframe the existing Self-Refine framework as a blank canvas for integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives, allowing Self-Refine’s iterative self-feedback loop to incorporate diverse contradictory self-evaluations from the LLM itself instead of relying on a single pass of self-feedback each round. This turns a single-stream refinement pipeline into a multi-perspective self-critique system that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of no extra training or supervision.
